---
title: "Indicadores Financieros"
author: "`r (function(){Sys.setlocale('LC_TIME', 'Spanish');format(Sys.time(), '%d %B, %Y')})()`"
output: 
  flexdashboard::flex_dashboard:
    theme:
      version: 4
      primary: "#0c1c32"
      base_font:
        google: "IBM Plex Sans"
    orientation: rows
    vertical_layout: fill
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---
 
```{css}
.navbar-author{ 
  font-size: 0.80rem;
  opacity: .60;
}
```

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(flexdashboard)
library(highcharter)
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(stringr)
library(bcchr)

dollar  <- partial(scales::dollar,  big.mark = ".", decimal.mark = ",")
comma   <- partial(scales::comma,   big.mark = ".", decimal.mark = ",")
percent <- partial(scales::percent, big.mark = ".", decimal.mark = ",", accuracy = 0.01)

newlang_opts <- getOption("highcharter.lang")
newlang_opts$weekdays     <- c("domingo", "lunes", "martes", "miércoles", "jueves", "viernes", "sábado")
newlang_opts$months       <- c("enero", "febrero", "marzo", "abril", "mayo", "junio", "julio",
                               "agosto", "septiembre", "octubre", "noviembre", "diciembre")
newlang_opts$shortMonths  <- c("ene", "feb", "mar", "abr", "may", "jun", "jul", "ago", "sep",
                               "oct", "nov", "dic")
newlang_opts$drillUpText  <- "◁ Volver a {series.name}"
newlang_opts$loading      <- "<i class='fas fa-circle-notch fa-spin fa-4x'></i>"
# newlang_opts$loading      <- "Cargando información"

newlang_opts$downloadCSV  <- "Descargar CSV"
newlang_opts$downloadJPEG <- "Descargar JPEG"
newlang_opts$downloadPDF  <- "Descargar PDF"
newlang_opts$downloadPNG  <- "Descargar PNG"
newlang_opts$downloadSVG  <- "Descargar SVG"
newlang_opts$downloadXLS  <- "Descargar Excel"
newlang_opts$printChart   <- "Imprimir gráfico"
newlang_opts$viewFullscreen <- "Ver pantalla completa"
newlang_opts$resetZoom    <- "Resetear zoom"
newlang_opts$rangeSelectorZoom <- ""
newlang_opts$thousandsSep <- "."
newlang_opts$decimalPoint <- ","

newlang_opts$contextButtonTitle <- "Menú contextual del gráfico"
newlang_opts$numericSymbols <- JS("null")

options(
  bcc_api_user = 178956728,
  bcc_api_pass = "cxynr4qyLLBw",
  highcharter.lang = newlang_opts,
  highcharter.theme = hc_theme(
    chart = list(
      zoomType = "x",
      style = list(
        fontFamily = "IBM Plex Sans",
        color = "#666666"
        )
      ),
    title = list(
      style = list(
        fontFamily = "Changa One",
        fontSize = "40px",
        color = "#36454F"
        )
      ),
    subtitle = list(
      style = list(
        fontSize = "15px"
        )
      ),
    tooltip = list(
      valueDecimals = 2
    ),
    xAxis = list(
      gridLineWidth = 1,
      gridLineColor = "#F3F3F3",
      startOnTick = FALSE,
      endOnTick = FALSE,
      lineWidth = 0,
      tickWidth = 0
      ),
    yAxis = list(
      gridLineWidth = 1,
      gridLineColor = "#F3F3F3",
      startOnTick = FALSE,
      endOnTick = FALSE,
      lineWidth = 0,
      tickWidth = 0
    ),
    exporting = list(enabled = FALSE),
    plotOptions = list(
      series = list(
        connectNulls = TRUE,
        marker = list(enabled = FALSE),
        states = list(hover = list(lineWidthPlus = 0))
        )
    ),
    colors = list("#0c1c32")
    )
  )

dashboard_lastdate <- Sys.Date()
dashboard_history_years <- 5
dashboard_download_years <- dashboard_history_years + 1
dashboard_zoom_years <- 1
dashboard_request_sleep <- 10

dashboard_history_firstdate <- dashboard_lastdate - lubridate::years(dashboard_history_years)
dashboard_download_firstdate <- dashboard_lastdate - lubridate::years(dashboard_download_years)
dashboard_zoom_firstdate <- dashboard_lastdate - lubridate::years(dashboard_zoom_years)

date_to_timestamp <- function(x) {
  highcharter::datetime_to_timestamp(as.Date(x))
}


# Install thematic and un-comment for themed static plots (i.e., ggplot2)
# thematic::thematic_rmd()
```

```{js}
window.syncDashboardExtremes = function (event) {
  if (!event || event.trigger === 'syncDashboard' || window.dashboardSyncing) {
    return;
  }

  if (typeof event.min !== 'number' || typeof event.max !== 'number') {
    return;
  }

  var sourceAxis = event.target;
  if (!sourceAxis || !sourceAxis.chart || !window.Highcharts) {
    return;
  }

  window.dashboardSyncing = true;

  try {
    Highcharts.charts.forEach(function (chart) {
      if (!chart || chart === sourceAxis.chart || !chart.xAxis || !chart.xAxis[0]) {
        return;
      }

      chart.xAxis[0].setExtremes(
        event.min,
        event.max,
        true,
        false,
        { trigger: 'syncDashboard' }
      );
    });
  } finally {
    window.dashboardSyncing = false;
  }
};
```

```{r helpers}
# dcatalogo <- bcchr::bcch_CatalogoSeries()
# dcatalogo |> glimpse() |> filter(stringr::str_detect(`Nombre cuadro`, "IMACEC")) |> View()
# dcatalogo |> glimpse() |> filter(stringr::str_detect(`Nombre de la serie`, "IMACEC")) |> View()
get_chart <- function(timeseries = "F049.DES.TAS.INE9.10.M", # "F032.PIB.FLU.R.CLP.EP18.Z.Z.0.T",
                      firstdate         = dashboard_download_firstdate,
                      lastdate          = dashboard_lastdate,
                      history_firstdate = dashboard_history_firstdate,
                      zoom_firstdate    = dashboard_zoom_firstdate,
                      subtitle          = NULL,
                      post_fun          = identity,
                      format_num        = identity,
                      enable_navigator  = TRUE,
                      enable_navigator_buttons = TRUE,
                      ...
                      )
  {
  
  # timeseries <- "F032.PIB.FLU.R.CLP.EP18.Z.Z.0.T"
  # firstdate <-  lubridate::ymd("20000101")
  # lastdate <- Sys.Date()
  # subtitle   <- "PIB, Producto Interno Bruto respecto año anterior"
  # post_fun   <- \(x) mutate(bcchr::bcch_calculo_var_porc(x, tipo = "anio_anterior"), value = 100 * value)
  # format_num <- \(x) percent(x/100, accuracy = 0.01)
  # ... <- NULL
  
  data <- bcchr::bcch_GetSeries(timeseries, firstdate = firstdate, lastdate = lastdate)
  data_description <- attr(data, "descripEsp")
  
  Sys.sleep(dashboard_request_sleep)
  
  data <- post_fun(data)
  
  data <- data |>
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(indexDateString), !is.na(value)) |>
    dplyr::transmute(
      x = lubridate::ymd(indexDateString),
      y = value
    ) |>
    dplyr::filter(x >= history_firstdate, x <= lastdate) |>
    dplyr::arrange(x) |>
    dplyr::group_by(x) |>
    dplyr::summarise(y = dplyr::last(y), .groups = "drop")
  
  date_index <- tibble::tibble(
    x = seq.Date(as.Date(history_firstdate), as.Date(lastdate), by = "day")
  )
  
  chart_data <- dplyr::left_join(date_index, data, by = "x")
  data_values <- dplyr::filter(chart_data, !is.na(y))

  title <- format_num(dplyr::last(data_values$y))
  last_data_date <- max(data_values$x)
  
  if(is.null(subtitle)){
    subtitle <- data_description
  }
  
  last_values <- tail(data_values$y, 2)
  value1 <- as.numeric(last_values[length(last_values)])
  value2 <- as.numeric(last_values[length(last_values) - 1])
  var_per <- value1/value2 - 1
  arrow <- ifelse(var_per > 0, "&#8599;", "&#8600;")
  var_per <- abs(var_per)

  subtitle <- stringr::str_glue(
      stringr::str_c(subtitle, "<br/>var. {vm} ({arrow} {vp})"),
      vm = format_num(value1 - value2),
      vp = percent(var_per)
    )
  
  range_selector_options <- if(enable_navigator_buttons) {
    list(
      enabled = TRUE,
      selected = 1,
      inputEnabled = FALSE,
      buttonTheme = list(
        fill = "transparent",
        stroke = "#d8dee7",
        `stroke-width` = 1,
        r = 2,
        style = list(color = "#666666", fontWeight = "400"),
        states = list(
          hover = list(
            fill = "#0c1c32",
            style = list(color = "#ffffff")
          ),
          select = list(
            fill = "#0c1c32",
            style = list(color = "#ffffff")
          )
        )
      ),
      buttons = list(
        list(type = "ytd", text = "YTD"),
        list(type = "year", count = 1, text = "1a"),
        list(type = "year", count = 5, text = "5a")
      )
    )
  } else {
    list(enabled = FALSE)
  }
  
  navigator_options <- list(
    enabled = enable_navigator,
    liveRedraw = TRUE,
    height = 24,
    margin = 2,
    maskFill = "rgba(12, 28, 50, 0.12)",
    outlineColor = "#d8dee7",
    handles = list(
      backgroundColor = "#ffffff",
      borderColor = "#0c1c32"
    ),
    xAxis = list(
      labels = list(enabled = FALSE),
      tickLength = 0,
      lineWidth = 0
    ),
    series = list(
      type = "line",
      color = "#0c1c32",
      lineWidth = 1
    )
  )
  
  hc <- hchart(chart_data, "line", hcaes(x, y), ...) |>
    hc_title(text = title) |>
    hc_subtitle(text = subtitle) |>
    hc_xAxis(
      type = "datetime",
      title = list(text = ""),
      min = date_to_timestamp(zoom_firstdate),
      max = date_to_timestamp(lastdate),
      ordinal = FALSE,
      events = list(
        afterSetExtremes = JS("function (event) { window.syncDashboardExtremes(event); }")
      )
    ) |>
    hc_yAxis(title = list(text = ""), opposite = TRUE)
  
  hc <- do.call(hc_rangeSelector, c(list(hc), range_selector_options))
  hc <- do.call(hc_navigator, c(list(hc), navigator_options))
  
  hc |>
    hc_caption(
      text = stringr::str_glue("ultimo dato: {format(last_data_date, '%d-%m-%Y')}"),
      align = "left",
      style = list(color = "#8c8c8c", fontSize = "10px")
    ) |>
    hc_scrollbar(enabled = FALSE) |>
    hc_exporting(enabled = FALSE)
  
}
```

Row 
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

###

```{r PIB}
# PIB
# F032.PIB.FLU.R.CLP.EP18.Z.Z.0.T - PIB volumen a precios del año anterior encadenado
# F032.PIB.FLU.R.CLP.EP18.Z.Z.1.T - PIB volumen a precios del año anterior encadenado (desestacionalizado)
# https://si3.bcentral.cl/Siete/ES/Siete/Cuadro/CAP_CCNN/MN_CCNN76/CCNN2018_P0_V2/637801082315858005?cbFechaInicio=2013&cbFechaTermino=2022&cbFrecuencia=QUARTERLY&cbCalculo=YTYPCT&cbFechaBase=
get_chart(
  "F032.PIB.FLU.R.CLP.EP18.Z.Z.0.T", 
  subtitle = "PIB, Producto Interno Bruto respecto año anterior",
  name = "PIB",
  post_fun = \(x) mutate(bcchr::bcch_calculo_var_porc(x, tipo = "anio_anterior"), value = 100 * value),
  format_num = \(x) percent(x/100)
  )

# this option is to avoid run all reamining chunks
# knitr::opts_chunk$set(eval = FALSE)
```

###

```{r IPC}
# IPC
# F074.IPC.VAR.Z.Z.C.M -	IPC General histórico, variación mensual
# F074.IPC.IND.Z.EP09.C.M	 - IPC General, variación anual
get_chart(
  "F074.IPC.IND.Z.EP09.C.M", 
  subtitle = "IPC, Índice Precios al Consumidor, variación anual",
  name = "IPC",
  format_num = \(x) percent(x/100)
  )
```

###

```{r desempleo}
# desempleo
# F049.DES.TAS.INE9.10.M	- Tasa  de  desempleo  (porcentaje)
get_chart(
  "F049.DES.TAS.INE9.10.M",
  subtitle = "Tasa  de  desempleo",
  name = "Desempleo (%)",
  format_num = \(x) percent(round(x, 2)/100)
  )
```

###

```{r, IMACEC}
# "F032.IMC.IND.Z.Z.EP18.Z.Z.0.M"
# "F032.IMC.VEL.Z.Z.2018.Z.Z.1.M"
get_chart(
  "F032.IMC.IND.Z.Z.EP18.Z.Z.0.M",
  subtitle = "IMACEC, Indicador mensual de actividad económica",
  name = "IMACEC",
  post_fun = \(x) mutate(bcchr::bcch_calculo_var_porc(x, tipo = "anio_anterior"), value = 100 * value),
  format_num = \(x) percent(round(x, 2)/100)
)
```

Row
-----------------------------------------------------------------------


###

```{r TPM}
# TPM
# F022.TPM.TIN.D001.NO.Z.D - Tasa de política monetaria (TPM) (porcentaje)
get_chart(
  "F022.TPM.TIN.D001.NO.Z.D",
  subtitle = "TPM, Tasa de política monetaria",
  name = "TPM",
  format_num = \(x) percent(x/100)
  )
```

###

```{r dolar}
# Dolar
# F073.TCO.PRE.Z.D - Tipo  de  cambio  nominal (dólar observado $/USD)        
get_chart(
  "F073.TCO.PRE.Z.D",
  subtitle = "TCN, Tipo cambio nominal",
  name = "Dólar observado",
  format_num = \(x) comma(x, suffix = "$/USD", accuracy = 0.01)
  )
```

###

```{r UF}
# F073.UFF.PRE.Z.D Unidad de fomento (UF)
get_chart(
  "F073.UFF.PRE.Z.D",
  subtitle = "UF, Unidad de Fomento",
  name = "UF",
  format_num = \(x) dollar(x, accuracy = 0.01)
  )
```

###

```{r UTM}
# F073.UTR.PRE.Z.M Unidad tributaria mensual (UTM)
get_chart(
  "F073.UTR.PRE.Z.M",
  subtitle = "UTM, Unidad tributaria mensual",
  name = "UTM",
  format_num = \(x) dollar(x, accuracy = 1),
  tooltip = list(valueDecimals = 0)
  )
```
